use_cases: Personal developer portfolio landing page with profile introduction
SaaS product landing page hero sections with call-to-action
Tech startup landing page header with animated entrance effects
ai_summary: A motion-rich hero component designed for developer portfolios and landing pages. Features a centered profile image, full-stack developer title, professional bio, and social links (GitHub, LinkedIn, Email). Uses Framer Motion for staggered entrance animations, a subtle grid background pattern, and gradient accents. Fully responsive with optimized typography scaling for mobile and desktop viewports.
